def negative_cryptographic_secret_hardcoded_in_test_fixture_or_seed():
    rule_id = "cryptographic_secret_hardcoded_in_test_fixture_or_seed"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Real-looking cryptographic secret, token, or private key hardcoded in a test fixture or seed file."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
